/home/runner/work/eckit/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -fPIC  -pipe -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-sign-compare -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/eckit_test_value_custom_params.dir/link.d  -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -shared -Wl,-soname,libeckit_test_value_custom_params.so -o libeckit_test_value_custom_params.so CMakeFiles/eckit_test_value_custom_params.dir/AnyKeyParams.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../lib" ../../lib/libeckit.so -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -ldl
